tech.title: Apple I hits the market
tech.description: Apple Computer sells its first batch of Apple I computers, helping kickstart the personal computing revolution.

news.title: U.S. Declaration of Independence
news.description: The Continental Congress adopts the Declaration of Independence, announcing the separation from Great Britain.

culture.title: Independence Day tops the box office
culture.description: The sci-fi film 'Independence Day' dominates theaters, becoming a defining ’90s blockbuster.
